# Code of Conduct

## The Short Version

Be decent. That's it.

## The Longer Version

This project is built and maintained by people who assume other contributors are
reasonable adults. We don't think you need a lengthy rulebook to know how to
treat people well.

**What we expect:**

- Engage in good faith — assume others mean well until proven otherwise.
- Keep technical disagreements about the code, not the person.
- Be direct. Bluntness is fine; cruelty is not.

**What we don't want:**

- Harassment, personal attacks, or sustained bad-faith behavior.
- Spam or off-topic noise that wastes contributors' time.

If something goes wrong, raise it with the maintainer at
[@soulwax](https://github.com/soulwax). Issues will be handled case by case
with common sense, not a tribunal.

We reserve the right to remove contributions or ban participants who make the
project unpleasant to work on — but we'd rather not have to.
